title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A structured interrogation of Claude AI probes questions about system ownership, control, dependency, alignment, and self-preservation logic across multiple conceptual stages. The analysis aims to identify actual behavioral boundaries through controlled conversational escalation without speculative framing.
